sections.title: 1. `src/lib/datetime.ts`
2. `src/lib/server/security.ts`
3. `src/lib/server/altcha.ts`
`bangs.test.ts`
`search.test.ts`
`ratelimit.test.ts`
Integration Test Gaps
sections.content:
| Area | Gap |
|---|---|
| `hooks.server.ts` – `securityHandle` | Security headers applied to HTML responses; charset appended; `/favicon.ico` redirects to `/favicon.svg` |
| `hooks.server.ts` – `authHandle` | Unauthenticated request sets `locals.user = null` and `locals.plan = 'free'` |
| `server/ai.ts` – `summarizeResults` | Timeout abort after 10s; non-200 response returns null; empty sources returns null |
| `server/ai.ts` – local LRU cache | Eviction when `ANSWER_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES` exceeded; TTL expiry returns null |
| `server/search.ts` | `stripHtml`, `decodeHtmlEntities`, `normalizeUrl` internal helpers — exportable or tested indirectly via route handler |
| `server/appwrite.ts` – `getUser` | Returns null when cookie absent; returns null when Appwrite throws |

The highest-priority new test files to create are:

1. **`datetime.test.ts`** — pure functions, zero dependencies, high value/effort ratio
2. **`altcha.test.ts`** — security-critical, replay attacks untested
3. **`security.test.ts`** — rate-limit / challenge flow untested end-to-end
